source_ref: Session-wrap S311 deliberation harvest per /kb-session-wrap Phase 1.5; owner authorization via prompt 2026-04-26 'construct the approval packet'
full_content:
# DELIB-HARVEST-BATCH-S311 - Session-Wrap Deliberation Harvest

**Type:** Batch operation manifest
**Session:** S311 (2026-04-26)
**Procedure:** /kb-session-wrap S311, Phase 1.5 (per SPEC-2098 C3)
**Operator:** Prime Builder (Claude Opus 4.7)
**Owner authorization:** explicit prompt 2026-04-26 'construct the approval packet' in response to Prime offer to either skip harvest or construct packet for owner-approved harvest invocation.

## Scope of harvest

The session-wrap harvester will scan and archive into groundtruth.db.deliberations:

1. Loyal Opposition reports (INSIGHTS-*.md in independent-progress-assessments/CODEX-INSIGHT-DROPBOX/): any S311-tagged reports.
2. VERIFIED bridge threads in bridge/INDEX.md from this session:
   - gtkb-kb-recovery-s311 (VERIFIED at -004)
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice1 (VERIFIED at -004)
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice2 (VERIFIED at -006)
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice3 (VERIFIED at -006)
3. GO-reviewed bridge proposals from this session:
   - gtkb-dora-001b-authoritative-deployment-source -008 GO
   - gtkb-dora-001b-track1-implementation -006 GO
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-implementation -004 GO
   - gtkb-db-backup-001-snapshot-daemon -004 GO
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice1 -002 GO
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice2 -004 GO
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice3 -004 GO
4. NO-GO bridge files (per SPEC-2098 - rejected alternatives are first-class deliberations):
   - kb-recovery -002, dora-001b -002/-004 (Track 1), isolation-016 wave2 -002, db-backup -002, bridge-poller -002/-005, slice2 -002, slice3 -002

## Owner decisions captured via AskUserQuestion (auto-archived by hook into pending-owner-decisions.md; harvester picks up via cross-link):

- DECISION-0020 through DECISION-0023: KB recovery option (A), Drive disposition (stop sync), atomic-replace timing (pause Drive), permanent fix (.driveignore)
- DECISION-0024 through DECISION-0028: DORA-001b sec 7.1/7.2/7.3 (A primary / C reconcile / B deferred + GTKB-DORA-001c + GOV-17 ack); ISOLATION-016 sec 3.3/3.5 (sandbox + clone-with-history-filter)
- Plus implicit clarifications: poller v1 scope (notify+manual rejected; auto-trigger via headless CLI), MCP verification gate (saved as feedback memory)

## Idempotency

Per SPEC-2098 C3 design: harvester is idempotent via content_hash deduplication. Safe to re-run; second invocation will detect already-archived entries and skip.

## Quality gates

The full release-candidate gate ran 18 times during S311 (one per commit) and remained green throughout. KB integrity_check returns ok. Composite quality score 90.9/100 with all 6 metrics passing.

## Authorization chain

- Owner triggered /kb-session-wrap S311 via slash-command
- Phase 1.5 (deliberation harvest) requires formal-artifact-approval-gate per GOV-ARTIFACT-APPROVAL-001
- Prime presented to owner the choice: skip harvest OR construct approval packet
- Owner selected 'construct the approval packet'
- This packet is the formal record of that authorization

## Reversibility

Deliberations are append-only with versioned IDs (UNIQUE(id, version)). If a harvest entry is later determined to be incorrect, a new version supersedes; the original is preserved for audit.
change_reason: Session-wrap deliberation harvest per SPEC-2098 C3: archive S311 Codex LO reports, VERIFIED + GO + NO-GO bridge proposals, and cross-referenced owner decisions into the Deliberation Archive.
